question: प्रत्येक ड्राइवर की आयु वर्ग के लिए, आयु वर्ग को सूचीबद्ध करें, हताहतों की औसत संख्या, और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल गणना।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES), COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID GROUP BY T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, 
    AVG(fa.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties, 
    COUNT(fa.ACCIDENT_ID) AS total_accidents
FROM 
    FACT_ACCIDENT fa
JOIN 
    DIM_DRIVER d ON fa.DRIVER_ID = d.DRIVER_ID
GROUP BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER
ORDER BY 
    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER;
raw_output:

    d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER, 
    AVG(fa.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties,

JOIN fact_accident fa ON bac.accident_id = fa.accident_id

GROUP BY dc.casualty_id, dc.casualty_class, dc.sex_of_casualty, fa.accident_severity
